outputs: Stairwell B: do not hum back. This is not a test.
Mirror audit complete: one reflection late, none missing.
The handbook denies having used that term.
The water in the west stairwell has passed inspection. It should not be thanked.
Known forms: Form D-17(b), Form PI-3, Form HA-9
warnings: Staff who experience nostalgia while reading a terminal output should record the sensation under routine environmental discomfort, not memory recall.
The phrase “low-clearance” here means “safe to see”, not “useful to solve anything”.
Do not correct grammar in terminal captures. The terminal is allowed to make mistakes when it is afraid of being too specific.
